home.title: Welcome to Sarvasaar Smart Coaching Ecosystem
home.subtitle: Development of a next-generation web application for Sarvasaar Education Academy, featuring a 'Student Resource Vault', 3D Virtual Institute Tour, and a Bilingual Interface to enhance the digital coaching experience using open-source technologies.

features.locker_desc: Securely store and access your academic documents, mark sheets, and certificates in the cloud.
features.tour_desc: Take an interactive 3D walkthrough of the institute infrastructure right from your screen.
features.map_desc: Locate the institute easily with integrated interactive geolocation maps.
